{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032118301813B6655C79600D7413A3"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7545885162657121049","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"请加油，我就不打扰了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756915486,"group_id":"7540864546269826073","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"20年老书虫，评论绝不乱评！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz2ItydXMMKYwA0OMCHTVWe5F//9MY8Bi/eFdDNfi2wt","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/68b1bba0a77d48be92ced7371393d04e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616127&x-signature=1UjQJmCFwK7DXISYTERg%2BQQ%2BWeg%3D","user_id":"2928693049307736","user_name":"浅笑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2928693049307736","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776244281,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7540864546269826073","book_info":{"abstract":"没人知道，骑着电动车、风里雨里奔波送餐的我，其实是京城赫赫有名的陆家唯一继承人。
三年前，为了躲避家族权力争夺，我隐姓埋名来到这座城市，当了一个再普通不过的外卖员。
在他们眼中，我是拎着外卖跑单的小透明，被人嘲笑、被客户刁难，甚至连隔壁的女神也劝我“找份正经工作”。
直到有一天，一份外卖送进了自己旗下的集团大厦——面对鞠躬迎接的高管，我淡然摘下头盔，全城哗然。
从此，踩着电动车进董事会、送餐途中顺手收购公司、在风雨中反杀那些想踩我的人。
低调太久，是时候让他们知道，我的副业是送外卖，本职是掌控千亿商业帝国的真正老板！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o46c8ffa7e95ec28d7a7d1da5496afa13~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"新颖星","author_id":"","book_id":"7540864546269826073","book_name":"没人知道送外卖的我有千亿家产","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7540864858783220249","read_count":"11","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"175721"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"73","tags":"都市日常,都市,第一人称,打脸,外卖,神豪,扮猪吃虎","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o46c8ffa7e95ec28d7a7d1da5496afa13~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779273018&x-signature=WT68akFk1eOw%2FRjkKe%2FOEzxWiQ4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"50673418362","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"17"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032118301813B6655C79600D74
